issues.sample: I HAD A FRONT END COLLISION AT 25 MPH WITH A PARKED CAR.  MY AIRBAG(S) DID NOT DEPLOY.  THE ENTIRE FRONT END OF MY CAR WAS DESTROYED.  THE HOOD WAS CRUMPLED AND BOTH FRONT QUARTER PANELS DAMAGED.  THE FRONT DOORS ARE NOT EASILY OPENED DUE TO THE QUARTER PANEL DAMAGE.  IT IS HARD

FOR THE FOURTH TIME THE REAR LIFT GATE HATCH WINDOW HAS SEPARATED FROM THE HINGE (S). IT ALWAYS HAPPENS WHILE IN MOTION AND ON JUST A STRAIGHT ROAD! I GUESS I WILL START TAKING PICS OF THE HINGES, NEVER THOUGH OF THAT SINCE IT IS ON WARRANTY. I AM AFRAID IT WILL SOMETIME FALL COM

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2014 GMC YUKON. WHILE OPERATING THE VEHICLE, THE TRACTION CONTROL WARNING INDICATOR ILLUMINATED BEFORE THE VEHICLE SUDDENLY STALLED. THE VEHICLE WAS TOWED TO THE CONTACT'S HOME. THE FAILURE WAS NOT DIAGNOSED OR REPAIRED. THE DEALER AND MANUFACTURER WERE NOT

driving down road car locks and unlocks, breaks lock up, slows down, radio went off ac starts going high and low took to dealership they said bad negative battery cable was told had a short got vehicle back driving down road ac starts going from high to low steering wheel goes up

WHILE DRIVING AT APPROXIMATELY 65 MPH ON A HIGHWAY, THE LOCKS ENGAGED, THE RADIO SHUT DOWN, POWER STEERING WAS LOST, AND THE VEHICLE SLOWED DOWN/BRAKED ON IT'S OWN.  THANKFULLY WE WERE ABLE TO MOVE TO THE SIDE OF THE ROAD WITHOUT GETTING HIT.  THE ONLY MESSAGE ON THE DASH WAS "SE

narrative.headline: What 2014 Gmc Yukon owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 61 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (20% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: I HAD A FRONT END COLLISION AT 25 MPH WITH A PARKED CAR.  MY AIRBAG(S) DID NOT DEPLOY.  THE ENTIRE FRONT END OF MY CAR WAS DESTROYED.  THE HOOD WAS CRUMPLED AND BOTH FRONT QUARTER PANELS DAMAGED.  THE FRONT DOORS ARE NOT EASILY OPENED DUE TO THE QUARTER PANEL DAMAGE.  IT IS HARD
